PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?show ?showLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q533788 p:P161 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P161 ?show .
  ?statement pq:P453 ?role .
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel .
  ?show rdfs:label ?showLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?roleLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?showLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "heather"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel) , "mccoy"))
}
LIMIT 1
